summary: A Fox News split-screen interview with DHS Asst Secretary Tricia McLaughlin about the hit-and-run death of USC student Nate Baker by an illegal immigrant, blaming open-border policies. It is a talking-head news interview with inset photos, not a stylized or music-driven produced piece, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: TRICIA MCLAUGHLIN | DHS PUBLIC AFFAIRS ASST SECRETARY; SOUTH CAROLINA STUDENT KILLED IN HIT-AND-RUN; STUDENT KILLED IN HIT-AND-RUN BY ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT
